tickets.title: Core feature: data model and API endpoints
tickets.description: Create the primary data model and expose it via API endpoints. After this ticket the core resource can be created, read, updated, and deleted.
tasks: Create the database migration for the primary resource
Create the model with validations and relationships
Implement CRUD endpoints (GET list, GET single, POST, PUT, DELETE)
Write integration tests for all endpoints
acceptance_criteria: All CRUD endpoints return correct status codes and response shapes
Invalid input returns 422 with field-level error messages
Integration tests cover the happy path and common error cases

tickets.title: Core feature: frontend list and detail views
tickets.description: Build the UI pages that consume the API — a paginated list and a detail view with an edit form.
tasks: Create the list page with pagination and basic filtering
Create the detail page showing all fields
Add a create/edit form with client-side validation
Handle loading, empty, and error states
acceptance_criteria: List page shows all records with working pagination
Create form submits successfully and updates the list
Edit form pre-populates with existing data
Error states display useful messages to the user
